_components._string: To get free coins, join a TEAM!
_components._N$string: To get free coins, join a TEAM!

_components._string: Collect stars to get amazing rewards!
_components._N$string: Collect stars to get amazing rewards!

_components._string: Create and lead your own team!
_components._N$string: Create and lead your own team!

_components._string: Type the team name you want to join search
_components._N$string: Type the team name you want to join search

_components._string: You need an internet connection to get coins.
_components._N$string: You need an internet connection to get coins.

_string:
WATCH A VIDEO AND GET
+3 MOVES!
_N$string:
WATCH A VIDEO AND GET
+3 MOVES!

_components._string: You can only change your name ONCE
_components._N$string: You can only change your name ONCE

_components._string: Stone bubble - Can be popped only with fireballs and bombs.
_components._N$string: Stone bubble - Can be popped only with fireballs and bombs.

_components._string: Chains - Hit the chains twice with the right color to break & unlock them.
_components._N$string: Chains - Hit the chains twice with the right color to break & unlock them.

_components._string: Rock - Nothing can pop it. try to drop it.
_components._N$string: Rock - Nothing can pop it. try to drop it.

_components._string: Shell - Remove the shell before popping the bubble or else it will spread.
_components._N$string: Shell - Remove the shell before popping the bubble or else it will spread.

_components._string: Spiderweb - Prevents a poping sequence when hit.
_components._N$string: Spiderweb - Prevents a poping sequence when hit.

_components._string: Ice - Wont pop when hit, but the ice will spread over, try to drop it.
_components._N$string: Ice - Wont pop when hit, but the ice will spread over, try to drop it.

_components._string: Counter - Has a number on it. every shot lowers the number by 1 till it burns into a rock bubble.
_components._N$string: Counter - Has a number on it. every shot lowers the number by 1 till it burns into a rock bubble.

_components._string: Spike bubble - Piece bubbles that are shot close to it.
_components._N$string: Spike bubble - Piece bubbles that are shot close to it.

_components._string: Dandelion - Keeps bubbles from falling, but bubbles can go right through them.
_components._N$string: Dandelion - Keeps bubbles from falling, but bubbles can go right through them.

_components._string: Wall - Hit it enough and the bubble behind it will show itself.
_components._N$string: Wall - Hit it enough and the bubble behind it will show itself.

_components._string: Seismic bubble - Pop any bubble next to it and it will explode the surrounding bubbles.
_components._N$string: Seismic bubble - Pop any bubble next to it and it will explode the surrounding bubbles.

_components._string: Random mine - Pop any bubble next to it, this bubble will paint surrounding bubbles in a random color!
_components._N$string: Random mine - Pop any bubble next to it, this bubble will paint surrounding bubbles in a random color!

_components._string: Paint bomb - When hit, spreads the same color all over the place.
_components._N$string: Paint bomb - When hit, spreads the same color all over the place.

_components._string: Rocket bubble - Pop it to fill your ROCKET power-up meter!
_components._N$string: Rocket bubble - Pop it to fill your ROCKET power-up meter!

_components._string: Laser - Dont be fooled by this innocent looking bubble! it will shooot down bubbles that will get too close!
_components._N$string: Laser - Dont be fooled by this innocent looking bubble! it will shooot down bubbles that will get too close!

_components._string: Wings - Drop it and it will fly away somewhere else. try to pop it instead.
_components._N$string: Wings - Drop it and it will fly away somewhere else. try to pop it instead.

_components._string: Tarantula - When hit, spreads spiderweb all over the place!
_components._N$string: Tarantula - When hit, spreads spiderweb all over the place!

_components._string: Binary stone - After every shot you make, the binary stone will change its state.
_components._N$string: Binary stone - After every shot you make, the binary stone will change its state.

_components._string: Disco bubble - Switches color each time you make a move.
_components._N$string: Disco bubble - Switches color each time you make a move.
